name: M5Core2Radio — WiFi OTR Internet Radio
description: WiFi internet radio for M5Stack Core2. Streams 8 classic/OTR stations from ROKiT Radio Network via 16-bit I2S audio (NS4168 amp, no DAC hiss). Retro 1940s skin. Touch footer or BtnA/B/C: SET=sound settings, STA=cycle station, VOL=cycle volume (0-10). Haptic feedback on touch. Hold BtnA on boot to change WiFi. Based on winRadio by Volos Projects.
author: CoreyMillia
